blocker: Live conjunctive grading requires applying engine_multifault.patch to shared core (sim/engine.py, sim/spec.py), which the no-edit-shared-core rule forbids; patch delivered+verified but not merged, so the secondary fault is inert in the unpatched engine until a one-commit follow-up applies it.
one_line: Added 3 schema-valid 2-fault CIDG scenarios (80/81/82-multi-*) with distinct SLO victims+fixes, a 6-case passing pytest, and a verified engine patch making resolution conjunctive; full suite 51/51 valid, no shared-core edits.
